overview: Manipal Institute of Technology (MIT Manipal), a premier constituent institute of Manipal Academy of Higher Education (MAHE), is known for its strong industry connections, modern infrastructure, and high placement rates in IT and core engineering sectors.
accreditation: NAAC A++ Grade (Cycle 3, CGPA 3.65/4.0). MAHE is a deemed-to-be university. NIRF 2024: 61st Engineering, 4th University Category.

placements.companiesVisited: Microsoft, Amazon, Goldman Sachs, Samsung, Cisco, Oracle, Deutsche Bank, Wells Fargo
placements.internationalOffers: International packages up to ₹2.19 Crore recorded

keyTrends.highestPackageTrend: Domestic highest: ₹54.75 LPA (2023–24) → ₹69.25 LPA (2024–25); Intl: ₹2.19 CPA

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions based on MET rank followed by counseling conducted by MAHE.
admissions.importantDates: Follows MET exam schedule and MAHE counseling timeline.

campus.area: Part of MAHE Manipal campus (~600+ acres)
campus.specialNote: Hostel: ₹45,000–₹1,80,000/year (by room type). Mess: ~₹46,000/year. Utilities: ~₹35,000. Semester hostel total: ~₹65,000–₹1,30,000. Scholarships: Top 100 MET: 100% waiver; 101–500: 50%; 501–5000: 20%. AICTE TFW: 5% seats (income < ₹8L).

contact.address: Manipal Institute of Technology, Manipal – 576104, Karnataka, India
